top_signals.title: Traders See 50% Chance That Warsh Fed Hikes Rates This Month
top_signals.summary: Traders see a US interest-rate hike later this month as a coin toss, with a renewed rise in oil prices and hawkish commentary from Federal Reserve officials auguring a swift move to tame inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump says US reinstates blockade of Iranian shipping in Strait of Hormuz after new clashes - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Trump says US reinstates blockade of Iranian shipping in Strait of Hormuz after new clashes  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU sanctions Russian GRU military hackers over cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: The European Union and the United Kingdom jointly sanctioned dozens of Russian individuals and entities and accused Russia of coordinating a network of hacking groups responsible for attacks across Europe. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Russian celebrity journalist Ksenia Sobchak says hackers accessed Telegram channels via email breach
top_signals.summary: Following the breach of several of her Telegram channels, controversial Russian journalist Ksenia Sobchak claimed published screenshots of her correspondence with political figures were fake.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Trump factor: will he help or hurt his party in the midterms?
top_signals.summary: Republican Congress member in Pennsylvania’s Lehigh Valley faces voter dissatisfaction with Washington
